calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicholas Lin, Esq. 415-693-6213 of Morgan Stanley for PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

Petitioner Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Petitioner to submit a proposed order and proposed judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
